arms.hypothesis: Executable domain micro contracts can move the local model past the repeated domain_behavior_failed plateau without a deterministic domain kernel.

arms.hypothesis: Public domain API contracts, export-surface normalization, and checkpoint scripts can prevent local-model export collapse while preserving hidden verifier isolation.

arms.modelPolicy: deterministic scaffold and deterministic domain kernel; no model-authored product code
arms.hypothesis: A known-good domain kernel plus scaffold should pass the public and hidden FSCRUD verifier, proving R30's remaining blocker was executable domain behavior.

arms.modelPolicy: same local Ollama model as baseline after deterministic domain kernel setup
arms.hypothesis: With the domain kernel protected, local PL can complete server, UI, docs, manifest, and verification-report work without corrupting protected artifacts.
arms.result: Observed in live-fscrud-r31-domain-kernel-20260504-1247: 93/100 flow_failed with domain behavior passing and ui_surface_incomplete remaining.

arms.modelPolicy: same local Ollama model as R31 after deterministic domain kernel setup
arms.hypothesis: With the domain kernel protected and explicit nearby UI entity/action gates, local PL can close the remaining ui_surface_incomplete failure without frontier edits.
arms.result: Observed in live-fscrud-r32-ui-surface-20260504-1448: 80/100 flow_failed with domain behavior passing and ui_surface_incomplete remaining.

arms.modelPolicy: same local Ollama model as R32 after deterministic domain kernel and deterministic UI skeleton setup
arms.hypothesis: With domain behavior and UI surface coverage supplied deterministically and protected, local PL can complete the remaining server, docs, manifest, report, and final wiring work without corrupting protected artifacts.
arms.claimBoundary: This is a deterministic UI skeleton control. A pass would not prove the local model can generate the UI surface; it would only support the narrower claim that local inference can perform constrained integration around deterministic behavioral and presentation contracts.
arms.result: Observed in live-fscrud-r33-ui-skeleton-20260504-1533: verifier passed 95/100 with hiddenOraclePassed=true, domainBehaviorPassed=true, uiSurface=true, and no hard failures, but the PL runner returned flow_failed because the prompt runner classified completion as no observable workspace progress.
